message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Abs primitive

Add 24 oracle tests for Abs primitive covering:
- Basic float values (positive, negative, zero)
- Integer types
- Special values (infinity, NaN)
- Mathematical properties: symmetry, non-negativity, multiplicativity
- Complex number magnitude
- 1D/2D tensor shapes
- Idempotence and triangle inequality verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
